llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI arm present: ai_copilot_access, which provides the copilot feature to agents. Control arm has the copilot disabled.
llm_extracted.notes: This is a DiD design with treatment intensity based on pre-treatment app penetration (transaction ratio = 0.446). The primary statistic uses the DiD coefficient Post×Ratio_tran = -0.4434 (SE 0.145). The outcome is log-transformed (log of 1 + days on market), so the coefficient directly represents the log ratio. The paper reports the effect as -0.198 log-points at mean treatment intensity (=-0.4434*0.446), which translates to a 5.27% decrease relative to baseline mean of 3.757. Since the outcome is already log-transformed, the regression coefficient can be used directly as the log ratio. Multiple specifications are reported (field experiment in Jinan, buyer-facing vs seller-facing exposure, heterogeneity by tenure), but the main DiD with transaction ratio is the primary specification for the overall treatment effect.
source_quotes: the time on market for sellers is lower by 0.198 (−0.4434*0.446) compared to the control group. Relative to a baseline pre-treatment mean of 3.757, this represents a 5.27% decrease.
